hospital.name: Thanthai Periyar Government Headquarters Hospital
hospital.authority: Tamil Nadu Directorate of Medical & Rural Health Services

departments.name: General Medicine
departments.head: Dr. R. Muthukumar
departments.desc: Comprehensive diagnosis and treatment of internal medicine conditions including fever, infections, and chronic illnesses.

departments.name: General Surgery
departments.head: Dr. S. Annamalai
departments.desc: All major and minor surgical procedures including laparoscopic surgeries and emergency trauma surgeries.

departments.name: Paediatrics
departments.head: Dr. P. Kavitha
departments.desc: Complete child healthcare from newborn to adolescence, including NICU and well-baby clinics.

departments.name: Obstetrics & Gynaecology
departments.head: Dr. M. Rajalakshmi
departments.desc: Antenatal care, safe deliveries, high-risk pregnancy management, and gynaecological procedures.

departments.name: Orthopaedics
departments.head: Dr. K. Senthilkumar
departments.desc: Bone fracture management, joint replacements, spine surgeries, and physiotherapy.

departments.name: Ophthalmology
departments.head: Dr. N. Subramanian
departments.desc: Cataract surgeries, glaucoma treatment, retinal services, and low vision rehabilitation.

departments.name: ENT
departments.head: Dr. A. Priya
departments.desc: Ear, nose, and throat surgeries including tonsillectomy, septoplasty, and hearing restoration.

departments.name: Psychiatry
departments.head: Dr. V. Chandrasekaran
departments.desc: Mental health counselling, de-addiction services, and inpatient psychiatric care.

departments.name: Dermatology
departments.head: Dr. L. Bhuvana
departments.desc: Skin disease management, leprosy control, and STD/HIV treatment services.

departments.name: Radiology
departments.head: Dr. T. Vijayakumar
departments.desc: X-Ray, Ultrasound, CT Scan, and MRI services — all free of cost for in-patients.

departments.name: Cardiology
departments.head: Dr. R. Saravanan
departments.desc: ECG, Echo, angiography, and catheterisation lab for cardiac conditions under super-speciality upgrade.

departments.name: Neurology
departments.head: Dr. S. Prabhakaran
departments.desc: Stroke management, epilepsy treatment, EEG, and neuro-rehabilitation services.

departments.name: Casualty & Emergency
departments.head: Dr. M. Aravind
departments.desc: Round-the-clock emergency care, trauma management, and mass casualty handling.

departments.name: Blood Bank
departments.head: Dr. K. Usha
departments.desc: Licensed blood bank with component separation, cross-matching, and 24/7 supply.

events.title: Free Cataract Surgery Camp
events.desc: A three-day free cataract surgery camp was conducted in collaboration with Aravind Eye Hospital. 214 patients from BPL families received free surgeries and post-operative care including free spectacles.

events.title: Maternal & Child Health Drive
events.desc: Week-long drive offering free antenatal check-ups, iron and folic acid distribution, nutrition counselling, and breastfeeding awareness for pregnant women across Erode taluk.
events.outcome: 380 mothers screened, 12 high-risk cases identified and managed

events.title: Diabetic & Hypertension Screening
events.desc: Mass screening programme for diabetes and hypertension extended to 8 rural Primary Health Centres. Free HbA1c and lipid profile tests were offered along with lifestyle counselling.
events.outcome: 650 screened, 87 new diabetics detected, 43 started on medication

events.title: Blood Donation Camp
events.desc: Annual blood donation camp organised in partnership with local engineering and arts colleges. The blood bank collected 186 units which replenished critical reserves.
events.outcome: 186 units collected, all screened and certified

events.title: Mental Health Awareness Week
events.desc: Conducted during World Mental Health Day. Free counselling, stress management workshops, and anti-stigma awareness programmes were held across 5 government schools.

events.title: School Health Programme
events.desc: Comprehensive health check-ups for students in 15 government schools covering vision, dental, hearing, nutrition assessment, and deworming. All findings recorded and shared with parents.

events.title: COVID-19 Vaccination Drive
events.desc: Erode Govt Hospital served as the nodal centre for COVID-19 vaccination in the district, managing distribution, cold chain, and administration across 20 sub-centres.

events.title: Free Knee Replacement Camp
events.desc: Under the CMCHIS scheme, 30 BPL patients above 55 years received free total knee replacement surgeries with full post-op rehabilitation and physiotherapy sessions.

events.title: Janani Suraksha Yojana Drive
events.desc: Quarterly distribution of JSY cash incentives and institutional delivery registrations. Health workers from 40 villages attended orientation on the scheme and referral pathways.

events.title: Anti-Tobacco Awareness Camp
events.desc: World No Tobacco Day event with de-addiction counselling, nicotine replacement therapy distribution, and awareness drives at key public places in Erode city.

achievements.title: Super Speciality Hospital Upgrade
achievements.desc: A B+G+8 storeyed super speciality block of 2,32,602 sq ft inaugurated by Chief Minister M.K. Stalin, built at ₹67.03 crore. Equipped with ₹11.02 crore worth of specialised medical equipment.

achievements.title: 20-Bed Pay Ward Launched
achievements.desc: Semi-private pay ward with enhanced amenities introduced to accommodate patients preferring privacy while core services remain free for underprivileged.
achievements.impact: Additional revenue channelled back to hospital services

achievements.title: Designated COVID-19 Speciality Hospital
achievements.desc: In April 2020, during the Tamil Nadu COVID-19 pandemic response, the hospital was converted into a COVID Speciality Hospital with 184 dedicated isolation beds, serving the entire Erode district.
achievements.impact: 184 isolation beds, thousands of COVID patients treated

achievements.title: CMCHIS Nodal Centre — ₹5L Coverage
achievements.desc: Designated as a nodal centre for Chief Minister's Comprehensive Health Insurance Scheme offering cashless treatment up to ₹5 lakhs for BPL families across 1000+ procedures.
achievements.impact: Thousands of BPL families receive free tertiary care annually

achievements.title: Zero Maternal Mortality Quarter
achievements.desc: Achieved zero maternal mortality for two consecutive quarters in FY 2022–23, recognised by the Tamil Nadu Directorate of Health Services for excellence in obstetric care.
achievements.impact: Zero maternal deaths — Q2 and Q3 of FY 2022–23

achievements.title: ISO-Compliant Biomedical Waste Management
achievements.desc: Hospital's biomedical waste management system overhauled to comply with BMW Management Rules 2016. Colour-coded segregation, GPS-tracked pickup, and digital waste logs implemented.
achievements.impact: 100% compliant waste disposal; zero open burning incidents

achievements.title: Tele-Medicine OPD for Rural Patients
achievements.desc: Launched tele-medicine consultations for patients in remote parts of Erode district, reducing travel burden for elderly and differently-abled patients.

achievements.title: Neonatal ICU Expansion
achievements.desc: NICU expanded from 12 to 28 beds with advanced warmers, ventilators, and pulse oximeters, drastically improving neonatal survival rates for premature babies.
achievements.impact: Neonatal survival rate improved from 72% to 89%

schemes.name: CM's Comprehensive Health Insurance Scheme (CMCHIS)
schemes.desc: Cashless treatment for 1,056 listed procedures at government and empanelled private hospitals.

schemes.name: Free Medicines Scheme
schemes.desc: Over 250 essential medicines available free at all counters — no prescription charge.

schemes.name: Free Diagnostics
schemes.desc: Full diagnostic panel free for all admitted patients. OPD patients get free basic tests.

schemes.name: Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY)
schemes.desc: Cash incentive for institutional delivery plus free antenatal care, iron supplements, and post-natal check-up.

schemes.name: 108 Emergency Ambulance
schemes.desc: Fully equipped emergency ambulance service free of charge. Call 108 from anywhere in Erode district.

schemes.name: Child Immunisation Programme
schemes.desc: Complete Universal Immunisation Programme vaccines — BCG, OPV, Hepatitis B, DPT, MMR — free of cost.

schemes.name: National TB Elimination Programme
schemes.desc: Free DOTS therapy, Nikshay Poshan Yojana ₹500/month nutrition support, and travel reimbursement.

schemes.name: Diabetic & Hypertension Control
schemes.desc: Free HbA1c tests, anti-diabetic and anti-hypertensive medicines, and regular monitoring under NPCDCS.
